summary: Complete testing of new Whitelist Cashback Dashboard enhancements. 10/10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified: Payment status toggle (Sudah/Belum) on both Whitelist CB and Input Spending pages, PDF filter modal with 'Semua Periode' and 'Pilih Periode' modes, Edit Referral modal with user list and inline edit, Referral Summary table with Sudah Bayar/Belum Bayar columns, Payment status filter dropdown, and Meta Pixel Lead event removal from /affiliate/dimas page.
seed_data_creation: Test user 'UI Test Payment User' with referral 'TestPaymentReferral' created and deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New payment status features fully tested. Key features: 1) PUT /api/admin/whitelist/spends/{id}/payment-status toggles between 'paid' and 'unpaid'. 2) PDF endpoints accept from_month/from_year/to_month/to_year query params for month range filtering. 3) Summary endpoint returns paid/unpaid amounts per user and referral. 4) Frontend has PdfFilterModal with 'Semua Periode' and 'Pilih Periode' modes. 5) EditReferralModal shows user list with inline edit for referral name, CB%, and bank info. 6) Payment status toggle badge (Sudah/Belum) on both Whitelist CB spend rows and Input Spending table. 7) Payment status filter dropdown with options: Semua Status, Ada Belum Dibayar, Semua Sudah Dibayar. 8) Meta Pixel Lead event removed from /affiliate/dimas page.

frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Referral Summary table shows SUDAH BAYAR and BELUM BAYAR columns
✓ Edit button on referral row opens Edit Referral modal
✓ Edit Referral modal shows user list with CB%, bank info
✓ Edit Referral modal - inline edit for referral name, CB%, bank info
✓ PDF button on referral row opens PDF Filter modal
✓ PDF Filter modal has 'Semua Periode' and 'Pilih Periode' modes
✓ PDF Filter modal - 'Pilih Periode' shows from_month/from_year/to_month/to_year fields
✓ Payment status filter dropdown (Semua Status / Ada Belum Dibayar / Semua Sudah Dibayar)
✓ Add whitelist user with full bank details
✓ Payment status toggle (Sudah/Belum) badge on Whitelist CB spend rows
✓ Toggle payment status changes from unpaid to paid and vice versa
✓ Input Spending table has STATUS column
✓ Payment status toggle (Sudah/Belum) badge on Input Spending table
✓ /affiliate/dimas page does NOT fire trackMetaEvent('Lead') on load

features_verified.payment_status_toggle: PUT endpoint toggles between 'paid' and 'unpaid', UI shows Sudah/Belum badge with icons
features_verified.pdf_filter_modal: Modal with 'Semua Periode' (all periods) and 'Pilih Periode' (month range) modes
features_verified.edit_referral_modal: Shows user list in referral, inline edit for referral name, CB%, bank info
features_verified.referral_summary_paid_unpaid: Table shows SUDAH BAYAR and BELUM BAYAR columns with amounts
features_verified.payment_status_filter: Dropdown with Semua Status, Ada Belum Dibayar, Semua Sudah Dibayar options
features_verified.input_spending_status: STATUS column with toggle badge on Input Spending page
